tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_npm_start_prints_final_counter
tests.trace:
npm_start_output = CompletedProcess(args=['npm', 'start'], returncode=127, stdout='\n> temporal-counter-ts@1.0.0 start\n> concurrently --kill-others -s first -n worker,client "npm run worker" "npm run client"\n\n', stderr='sh: 1: concurrently: not found\n')

    def test_npm_start_prints_final_counter(npm_start_output: subprocess.CompletedProcess):
        combined = (npm_start_output.stdout or "") + (npm_start_output.stderr or "")
        # The client must print the final counter value (10) to stdout.
>       assert re.search(r"(?<!\d)10(?!\d)", combined), (
            f"Expected combined output of `npm start` to contain the final counter value '10', "
            f"got stdout=\n{npm_start_output.stdout}\nstderr=\n{npm_start_output.stderr}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Expected combined output of `npm start` to contain the final counter value '10', got stdout=
E         
E         > temporal-counter-ts@1.0.0 start
E         > concurrently --kill-others -s first -n worker,client "npm run worker" "npm run client"
E         
E         
E         stderr=
E         sh: 1: concurrently: not found
E         
E       assert None
E        +  where None = <function search at 0x79e9b1dfbba0>('(?<!\\d)10(?!\\d)', '\n> temporal-counter-ts@1.0.0 start\n> concurrently --kill-others -s first -n worker,client "npm run worker" "npm run client"\n\nsh: 1: concurrently: not found\n')
E        +    where <function search at 0x79e9b1dfbba0> = re.search
